items.title: VSCodium
items.description: A telemetry-free build of VS Code. My daily editor for any language.

items.title: tmux
items.description: A terminal multiplexer for splits and persistent sessions. I struggle to understand how I could ever administer my server without it.

items.title: zsh
items.description: A highly customizable Unix shell. My default shell on all systems.

items.title: Debian
items.description: A stable, no-surprises Linux distribution. My default choice for servers.

items.title: Fedora
items.description: A polished, more up-to-date Linux distribution. My daily-driver desktop.

items.title: NixOS
items.description: A Linux distro with fully declarative, reproducible system config. While still learning its basics, I've already become a big fan and started daily-driving it.
